## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, stack traces, or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- mPM version / commit:
- Browser (if UI issue):
- Deployment method: local Sail / CapRover / other

## Additional Context

Any other context that might help diagnose the issue.
